'''Peez Bonko''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] who was the leader of the [[Gran supremacists]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted dead by [[Freedom for the Incarcerated]] for leading a supremacy group of Gran inmates. He was killed by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] who claimed the bounty on his head.
